description_long: This is a slim, full-size black keyboard with a low-profile design and a sleek, modern appearance. The keyboard features a standard QWERTY layout with a full set of alphanumeric keys, function keys, and a numeric keypad on the right. The keycaps are flat and closely spaced, with white and yellow legends for easy visibility. The top edge of the keyboard includes a glossy strip, likely for solar charging or decorative purposes, and a small brand logo is centered above the function keys. The chassis appears to be made of plastic with a matte finish, and the overall build is lightweight and compact. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, suggesting a wireless design.
description: A slim, full-size black keyboard with a QWERTY layout, numeric keypad, and a sleek, modern design. Features white and yellow key legends and a glossy top strip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the numeric keypad and the centered brand logo above the function keys.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the keyboard's slim profile and the flat, closely spaced keycaps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge and the overall width of the keyboard, with the glossy top strip visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view emphasizing the keyboard's thinness and the arrangement of the keys.
